GUIDs, emails, subscription names, tenant names, and resource names were replaced with approved Microsoft fictitious values (contoso.com, Contoso subscription, MyDemoResource, etc.). The scrubber processed all cross-origin iframes in the Azure portal (56+ replacements per page).
